title: Implement manager auth/session introspection endpoint for mobile runtime
description: Add backend auth/me endpoint and supporting service wiring so manager app can validate persisted access tokens and resolve deterministic role/scope session state.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/auth/me returns stable session payload for valid manager token
Invalid/expired token paths return deterministic auth-session-v1 envelope
Role/scope claims in auth/me align with login payload contract
